[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010110100 5
1 1010000000 2
2 0000000000 a
3 1000000000 1
4 1010110100 5
5 1010000000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 0111001101 6
12 0000000000 a match 2 6 7
23 0000010101 3
34 1010100010 4
45 0000010000 1
56 0101000000 2
67 0000110100 3
70 1000000000 1 match 3

02 0101001000 3
13 0000010000 1

46 0000000000 a match 2 6 7

71 0110000000 2

72 0100000000 1
